SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN 506. PLAINTIFF ZAKHARY MALLETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESCCILIANO MENDOZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLETT, ZAKHARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, PRESCILIANO $1,712.68 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,777.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
